meaning: n.闪族人,闪米特人(包括希伯来人、阿拉伯人、巴比伦人等,今特指犹太人)
examples: He's a racist and an anti - Semite and a prick.
If it were, I myself would be an anti - Semite.
The Pope has made a openly declared and unshakeable anti-Semite a legitimate bishop, "Politi added."
Le Pen's opponents say he is a racist and anti-Semite, and an embarrassment to France.
Father Charles Coughlin, the radio priest and another professional anti-Semite, broadcast out of suburban Detroit.
